HERO.NAME: Giovanny Jukopila
HERO.DESCRIPTION: Full Stack Software Engineer with 5+ years shipping web & mobile products end to end. Tech-agnostic by mindset, I pair solid engineering fundamentals with AI-assisted workflows (Claude, agents) to learn fast and deliver with speed, quality and security, whatever the stack demands.

ABOUT.TITLE: About Me
ABOUT.STORY: I'm a Full Stack Software Engineer based in Malta, originally from Colombia. I design, build, deploy and maintain scalable web and mobile applications across frontend, backend, databases and cloud.
ABOUT.STORY2: I'm tech-agnostic and a fast learner: I don't limit myself to the tools I already know. With modern AI-assisted workflows (Claude, agents) I ramp up on new stacks quickly and ship with speed, effectiveness and security, without compromising engineering quality.

SKILLS.TITLE: Technical Skills
SKILLS.SUBTITLE: A pragmatic, full-stack toolset spanning web, mobile and cloud.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Featured Projects
PROJECTS.SUBTITLE: Real products I've built and shipped, from SaaS platforms to mobile apps and corporate sites.

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: Work Experience
EXPERIENCE.SUBTITLE: 5+ years delivering software across startups and agencies in Europe and Latin America.

CONTACT.TITLE: Get In Touch
CONTACT.SUBTITLE: Have a project or a role in mind? I'd love to hear about it.
CONTACT.CONNECT_TEXT: I'm always open to discussing new projects, ideas or opportunities to be part of your vision.
